fields.name: api_key
fields.title: Consumer Key
fields.description: WooCommerce REST API consumer key (starts with ck_)

fields.name: api_secret
fields.title: Consumer Secret
fields.description: WooCommerce REST API consumer secret (starts with cs_)

replication_config.title: Replication Configuration
replication_config.description: Settings for data replication from WooCommerce.

fields.name: start_date
fields.title: Start Date
fields.description: UTC date in the format YYYY-MM-DD from which to start replicating data.

custom_description:
Connector for the WooCommerce REST API (v3). Provides read access to a WooCommerce store's
customers, orders, products, coupons, product categories, tags, reviews, attributes,
variations, order notes, refunds, payment gateways, shipping methods, shipping zones,
tax rates, and tax classes. Requires a WooCommerce store URL and REST API consumer
key / consumer secret for authentication.
supported_questions:
- List all customers in WooCommerce
- Show me all orders
- List all products
- Show me all coupons
- List all product categories
- Show me the product reviews
- List all shipping zones
- Show me the tax rates
- List all payment gateways
- Find orders placed this month
- What are the top-selling products?
- Show me customers who have made purchases
- Find all coupons expiring this year
- What orders are still processing?
unsupported_questions:
- Create a new product
- Update an order status
- Delete a customer
- Apply a coupon to an order
- Process a refund

fields.description: Sum of line item taxes only

fields.description: Currency the order was created with, in ISO format

fields.description: Note left by the customer during checkout
